title: galium lanatum
intro: Galium lanatum, also known as California bedstraw or gooseberry, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family. The plant's leaves and stems have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Galium lanatum has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and is also believed to have antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Galium lanatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
